refresh_cadence: daily check; publish after new tournament/event detection

fields.name: event_id
fields.description: Upstream tournament event identifier

fields.name: event_name
fields.description: Tournament event name

fields.name: event_date
fields.description: ISO-8601 event date

fields.name: event_tier
fields.description: Tournament tier as reported by MunchStats (e.g. International, Regional, Special)

fields.name: team_id
fields.description: Upstream team identifier

fields.name: player_id
fields.description: Upstream player identifier

fields.name: placement
fields.description: Final placement for the team in the event

fields.name: record_wins
fields.description: Player's win count for the event, if reported

fields.name: record_losses
fields.description: Player's loss count for the event, if reported

fields.name: slot_number
fields.description: Roster slot (1-6) for the team member row

fields.name: pokemon_name
fields.description: Roster Pokémon name as reported by MunchStats

fields.name: form_name
fields.description: Roster form label prior to normalization, if reported

fields.name: item_name
fields.description: Held item for the roster slot, if reported

fields.name: ability
fields.description: Ability for the roster slot, if reported

fields.name: tera_type
fields.description: Tera type for the roster slot, if reported

fields.name: moves
fields.description: Pipe-delimited (|) move list for the roster slot, if reported

fields.name: source_name
fields.description: Constant: MunchStats

fields.name: source_url
fields.description: Page or endpoint the record was extracted from

fields.name: source_record_id
fields.description: Upstream MunchStats record/row identifier

fields.name: extracted_at_utc
fields.description: ISO-8601 UTC extraction timestamp

fields.name: dataset_version
fields.description: Dataset version this staging snapshot feeds

known_risks: Roster naming inconsistencies that reduce automated match confidence
